source: getAccountInfo (encoding:base64) via api.mainnet-beta.solana.com; account created by vaultTransactionCreate in tx 3k6e2nPk7beCckzD2Qhh3XrJq99SYwKiqnyGdNHeC6j6K1iTxrpe2QW5twmYR5Uso3om6U61Gp3qDcy62gtCitjT (slot 428216912)
note: REAL mainnet Squads v4 VaultTransaction PDA. Account discriminator equals sha256('account:VaultTransaction')[0..8] = a8faa264510ea2cf. Parses with EXACT byte consumption (344/344). NOTE: both inner instructions' program_id_index (5 and 7) are >= account_keys.len (5), so the inner program IDs resolve into ADDRESS-TABLE-LOOKUP space and CANNOT be resolved offline from the account bytes alone -> the inner-instruction analyzer must mark these program IDs unresolved and the verdict MUST fail-closed (never SIGN). This makes the fixture a natural test of both the borsh decode path AND the ALT-unresolved fail-closed path.
